title: PNG to WEBP Converter
description: Convert PNG images to WEBP format online for free. WEBP provides modern compression for smaller file sizes while keeping visual quality, ideal for websites and faster page loads.

faq.question: Why convert PNG to WEBP?
faq.answer: WEBP provides smaller file sizes while maintaining excellent image quality.

faq.question: Does WEBP support transparency?
faq.answer: Yes. WEBP supports transparent backgrounds just like PNG.
